{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Tax Supervisor",
  "description": "Ikeja Electricity Distribution Company (IKEDC) is one of the largest power distribution companies in Nigeria, committed to delivering reliable and efficient electricity services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we aim to transform the energy landscape in Nigeria and contribute to the country&#39;s economic development. Our mission is to provide exceptional service while ensuring the safety and well-being of our employees and customers.

At Ikeja Electric, we don&rsquo;t just power homes and businesses &ndash; we power careers. As a leading energy provider, we are committed to fostering a culture that champions integrity, innovation, and excellence. Our team is the heartbeat of our success, and we thrive on collaboration, continuous improvement, and creating a workplace where everyone can shine.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tax Supervisor
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Role Purpose


	To support effective tax management by ensuring accurate tax computation, timely filing and remittance of statutory obligations, coordination of tax accounting and reconciliations, and providing tax advisory on business transactions, while maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements and internal policies.


Role Accountabilities


	Analyse the tax aspects of any agreements made by the company with third parties and advise managers accordingly.
	Co-ordinate different accounting units to ensure proper accounting and reconciliation of taxes.
	Manage tax provision and tax compliance process.
	Filing of TDS Return, Sales Tax Return, Work Contract Tax Return, Service Tax Return, TCS Return, and Income-Tax Return &amp; Wealth Tax Return.
	Deposit of Income Tax, Sales Tax, Services Tax, Work Contract Tax, Tax Collected at source, Tax Deducted at Source, Wealth Tax etc.
	Prepare and send MIS report on the status of all tax related compliance.
	Comply with Quality Management System / Occupational Health &amp; Safety requirements including objectives and applicable regulations relating to assigned jobs.
	Carry out any other duty as requested by the Unit Head or Head of Department.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or it&#39;s equivalent in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related numerate disciplines
	2-5 years of progressive experience in tax advisory and compliance.
	Highly preferred certification from ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria), ACCA, or CITN (Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria).
	Good understanding of Nigerian tax legislation (Companies Income Tax, VAT, Withholding Tax, Personal Income Tax), along with experience in managing tax audits and disputes.


Skills and Competencies:


	Profit &amp; Loss Management
	Revenue Management
	Accounting Policies and Transactions
	Tax Management
	Customer Centricity
	Risk Management
	Change Management
	People Leadership
	Enterprenurship
	Organizational Learning.


Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-02",

Tax Supervisor Job at Ikeja Electricity Distribution Company Plc




        
    

        
        Ikeja Electricity Distribution Company (IKEDC) is one of the largest power distribution companies in Nigeria, committed to delivering reliable and efficient electricity services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation and sustainability, we aim to transform the energy landscape in Nigeria and contribute to the country's economic development. Our mission is to provide exceptional service while ensuring the safety and well-being of our employees and customers.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At Ikeja Electric, we don’t just power homes and businesses – we power careers. As a leading energy provider, we are committed to fostering a culture that champions integrity, innovation, and excellence. Our team is the heartbeat of our success, and we thrive on collaboration, continuous improvement, and creating a workplace where everyone can shine.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tax Supervisor
Job Location: Lagos

Role Purpose


	To support effective tax management by ensuring accurate tax computation, timely filing and remittance of statutory obligations, coordination of tax accounting and reconciliations, and providing tax advisory on business transactions, while maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements and internal policies.


Role Accountabilities


	Analyse the tax aspects of any agreements made by the company with third parties and advise managers accordingly.
	Co-ordinate different accounting units to ensure proper accounting and reconciliation of taxes.
	Manage tax provision and tax compliance process.
	Filing of TDS Return, Sales Tax Return, Work Contract Tax Return, Service Tax Return, TCS Return, and Income-Tax Return & Wealth Tax Return.
	Deposit of Income Tax, Sales Tax, Services Tax, Work Contract Tax, Tax Collected at source, Tax Deducted at Source, Wealth Tax etc.
	Prepare and send MIS report on the status of all tax related compliance.
	Comply with Quality Management System / Occupational Health & Safety requirements including objectives and applicable regulations relating to assigned jobs.
	Carry out any other duty as requested by the Unit Head or Head of Department.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or it's equivalent in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related numerate disciplines
	2-5 years of progressive experience in tax advisory and compliance.
	Highly preferred certification from ICAN (Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria), ACCA, or CITN (Chartered Institute of Taxation of Nigeria).
	Good understanding of Nigerian tax legislation (Companies Income Tax, VAT, Withholding Tax, Personal Income Tax), along with experience in managing tax audits and disputes.


Skills and Competencies:


	Profit & Loss Management
	Revenue Management
	Accounting Policies and Transactions
	Tax Management
	Customer Centricity
	Risk Management
	Change Management
	People Leadership
	Enterprenurship
	Organizational Learning.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Site Engineer",
  "description": "CasaLavoro Limited is a fast-growing company with diverse interests in Real Estate, Hospitality, Asset Management, and Agricultural Commodity Trading. We&#39;re committed to excellence and innovation, delivering top-tier services that set new industry standards. Our expertise and passion drive growth, reliability, and exceptional client experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Site Engineer to manage and oversee on-site construction activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all engineering and technical aspects of construction projects are carried out accurately, efficiently, and according to specifications and safety standards.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and monitor day-to-day site operations.
	Ensure project work is executed according to approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and other professionals on site.
	Manage site documentation including reports, materials usage, labor records, and progress updates.
	Interpret and explain plans and contract terms to technical workers and clients.
	Ensure all materials used and work performed comply with quality standards and project specifications.
	Resolve unexpected technical difficulties and coordinate problem-solving efforts on-site.
	Conduct site inspections and safety audits to enforce compliance.
	Manage project timelines, budgeting, and reporting.
	Liaise with local authorities for permits, inspections, and approvals when necessary.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Engineering, or any related field.
	Proven experience of 4-7years as a site engineer or similar role in construction projects.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, construction methods, and safety regulations.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, MS Project, or Revit.
	Excellent project management, communication, and leadership skills.
	Ability to work in fast-paced environments and make decisions under pressure.
	Solid understanding of budgeting, resource allocation, and quality control.
	Valid professional certification or license is a plus.


Preferred Skills:


	Knowledge of green building standards or sustainability practices.
	Familiarity with modern construction technologies and equipment.
	Hands-on experience with surveying and measurement tools.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and allowances.
	On-site accommodation and transportation (if applicable).
	Health and safety coverage.
	Career development and training programs.
	Work in dynamic project environments with growth opportunities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@casalavoro.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Site Engineer Job at CasaLavoro Limited




        
    

        
        CasaLavoro Limited is a fast-growing company with diverse interests in Real Estate, Hospitality, Asset Management, and Agricultural Commodity Trading. We're committed to excellence and innovation, delivering top-tier services that set new industry standards. Our expertise and passion drive growth, reliability, and exceptional client experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Site Engineer to manage and oversee on-site construction activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all engineering and technical aspects of construction projects are carried out accurately, efficiently, and according to specifications and safety standards.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and monitor day-to-day site operations.
	Ensure project work is executed according to approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and other professionals on site.
	Manage site documentation including reports, materials usage, labor records, and progress updates.
	Interpret and explain plans and contract terms to technical workers and clients.
	Ensure all materials used and work performed comply with quality standards and project specifications.
	Resolve unexpected technical difficulties and coordinate problem-solving efforts on-site.
	Conduct site inspections and safety audits to enforce compliance.
	Manage project timelines, budgeting, and reporting.
	Liaise with local authorities for permits, inspections, and approvals when necessary.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Engineering, or any related field.
	Proven experience of 4-7years as a site engineer or similar role in construction projects.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, construction methods, and safety regulations.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, MS Project, or Revit.
	Excellent project management, communication, and leadership skills.
	Ability to work in fast-paced environments and make decisions under pressure.
	Solid understanding of budgeting, resource allocation, and quality control.
	Valid professional certification or license is a plus.


Preferred Skills:


	Knowledge of green building standards or sustainability practices.
	Familiarity with modern construction technologies and equipment.
	Hands-on experience with surveying and measurement tools.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and allowances.
	On-site accommodation and transportation (if applicable).
	Health and safety coverage.
	Career development and training programs.
	Work in dynamic project environments with growth opportunities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Site Engineer",
  "description": "CasaLavoro Limited is a fast-growing company with diverse interests in Real Estate, Hospitality, Asset Management, and Agricultural Commodity Trading. We&#39;re committed to excellence and innovation, delivering top-tier services that set new industry standards. Our expertise and passion drive growth, reliability, and exceptional client experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Site Engineer to manage and oversee on-site construction activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all engineering and technical aspects of construction projects are carried out accurately, efficiently, and according to specifications and safety standards.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and monitor day-to-day site operations.
	Ensure project work is executed according to approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and other professionals on site.
	Manage site documentation including reports, materials usage, labor records, and progress updates.
	Interpret and explain plans and contract terms to technical workers and clients.
	Ensure all materials used and work performed comply with quality standards and project specifications.
	Resolve unexpected technical difficulties and coordinate problem-solving efforts on-site.
	Conduct site inspections and safety audits to enforce compliance.
	Manage project timelines, budgeting, and reporting.
	Liaise with local authorities for permits, inspections, and approvals when necessary.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Engineering, or any related field.
	Proven experience of 4-7years as a site engineer or similar role in construction projects.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, construction methods, and safety regulations.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, MS Project, or Revit.
	Excellent project management, communication, and leadership skills.
	Ability to work in fast-paced environments and make decisions under pressure.
	Solid understanding of budgeting, resource allocation, and quality control.
	Valid professional certification or license is a plus.


Preferred Skills:


	Knowledge of green building standards or sustainability practices.
	Familiarity with modern construction technologies and equipment.
	Hands-on experience with surveying and measurement tools.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and allowances.
	On-site accommodation and transportation (if applicable).
	Health and safety coverage.
	Career development and training programs.
	Work in dynamic project environments with growth opportunities.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and cover letter to:&nbsp;hr@casalavoro.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

        CasaLavoro Limited is a fast-growing company with diverse interests in Real Estate, Hospitality, Asset Management, and Agricultural Commodity Trading. We're committed to excellence and innovation, delivering top-tier services that set new industry standards. Our expertise and passion drive growth, reliability, and exceptional client experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Site Engineer

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Site Engineer to manage and oversee on-site construction activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring that all engineering and technical aspects of construction projects are carried out accurately, efficiently, and according to specifications and safety standards.


Responsibilities


	Supervise and monitor day-to-day site operations.
	Ensure project work is executed according to approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards.
	Coordinate with architects, contractors, subcontractors, and other professionals on site.
	Manage site documentation including reports, materials usage, labor records, and progress updates.
	Interpret and explain plans and contract terms to technical workers and clients.
	Ensure all materials used and work performed comply with quality standards and project specifications.
	Resolve unexpected technical difficulties and coordinate problem-solving efforts on-site.
	Conduct site inspections and safety audits to enforce compliance.
	Manage project timelines, budgeting, and reporting.
	Liaise with local authorities for permits, inspections, and approvals when necessary.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Engineering, or any related field.
	Proven experience of 4-7years as a site engineer or similar role in construction projects.
	Strong knowledge of engineering principles, construction methods, and safety regulations.
	Proficiency in engineering software such as AutoCAD, MS Project, or Revit.
	Excellent project management, communication, and leadership skills.
	Ability to work in fast-paced environments and make decisions under pressure.
	Solid understanding of budgeting, resource allocation, and quality control.
	Valid professional certification or license is a plus.


Preferred Skills:


	Knowledge of green building standards or sustainability practices.
	Familiarity with modern construction technologies and equipment.
	Hands-on experience with surveying and measurement tools.


Benefits


	Competitive salary and allowances.
	On-site accommodation and transportation (if applicable).
	Health and safety coverage.
	Career development and training programs.
	Work in dynamic project environments with growth opportunities.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager (Logistics)",
  "description": "Staff-Recruit&nbsp;is a leading Human Resource and Management Consulting firm which provides a range of recruitment, selection, outsourcing, training &amp; development solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Operations Manager (Logistics)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	The Operations Manager will be the engine behind our day-to-day service delivery across all three business lines. You will own operational performance, process efficiency, and team execution - ensuring our Rescue, Refuel, and Fleet services consistently meet the standards our customers depend on.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee end-to-end operations across Rescue (towing/roadside assistance), Refuel
	(PMS/AGO delivery logistics), and Fleet (SaaS client onboarding and support)
	Develop and enforce standard operating procedures (SOPs) across all service lines
	Manage field agents, dispatch coordination, and vendor/supplier relationships
	Monitor key operational KPIs (response times, delivery SLAs, fleet uptime) and drive continuous improvement
	Identify and resolve operational bottlenecks, escalations, and service failures in real time
	Coordinate closely with the Product, Tech, and Customer Service teams to ensure readiness for new features and service rollouts
	Support fleet client onboarding and ensure seamless service delivery for B2B accounts
	Manage inventory and asset utilisation &mdash; vehicles, fuel stock, and field equipment
	Prepare weekly and monthly operational reports for executive review
	Build and lead a high-performing operations team as the company scales


What We Are Looking For


	A Degree in Operations Management, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field
	4&ndash;7 years of operations experience, preferably in logistics, mobility, field services, or energy
	Strong understanding of last-mile logistics, dispatch systems, or fleet/fuel management
	Proven ability to manage cross-functional teams and third-party service providers
	Data-driven mindset &mdash; comfortable tracking KPIs, building dashboards, and making decisions from metrics
	Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to stay calm under operational pressure
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
	Familiarity with operations or fleet management software is a plus.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;staffrecruit15@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Staff-Recruit"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",

  },

      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Operations Manager (Logistics) Job at Staff-Recruit




        
    

        
        Staff-Recruit is a leading Human Resource and Management Consulting firm which provides a range of recruitment, selection, outsourcing, training & development solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager (Logistics)

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Operations Manager will be the engine behind our day-to-day service delivery across all three business lines. You will own operational performance, process efficiency, and team execution - ensuring our Rescue, Refuel, and Fleet services consistently meet the standards our customers depend on.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee end-to-end operations across Rescue (towing/roadside assistance), Refuel
	(PMS/AGO delivery logistics), and Fleet (SaaS client onboarding and support)
	Develop and enforce standard operating procedures (SOPs) across all service lines
	Manage field agents, dispatch coordination, and vendor/supplier relationships
	Monitor key operational KPIs (response times, delivery SLAs, fleet uptime) and drive continuous improvement
	Identify and resolve operational bottlenecks, escalations, and service failures in real time
	Coordinate closely with the Product, Tech, and Customer Service teams to ensure readiness for new features and service rollouts
	Support fleet client onboarding and ensure seamless service delivery for B2B accounts
	Manage inventory and asset utilisation — vehicles, fuel stock, and field equipment
	Prepare weekly and monthly operational reports for executive review
	Build and lead a high-performing operations team as the company scales


What We Are Looking For


	A Degree in Operations Management, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field
	4–7 years of operations experience, preferably in logistics, mobility, field services, or energy
	Strong understanding of last-mile logistics, dispatch systems, or fleet/fuel management
	Proven ability to manage cross-functional teams and third-party service providers
	Data-driven mindset — comfortable tracking KPIs, building dashboards, and making decisions from metrics
	Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to stay calm under operational pressure
	Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
	Familiarity with operations or fleet management software is a plus.


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Bedrock Residences is a hospitality firm offering premium, fully serviced apartments thoughtfully designed to deliver comfort, convenience, and an exceptional guest experience. We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Reservation &amp; Ticketing Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality

Job Summary


	The Reservation &amp; Ticketing Officer will manage end-to-end travel operations, ensuring seamless bookings and exceptional guest experiences.
	You will be responsible for accurate ticket issuance, hotel reservations, and travel packages while maintaining strict compliance with airline and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Ticketing &amp; Booking: Handle flight reservations, ticket issuance, reissues, refunds, and cancellations via airline portals.
	Travel Coordination: Process hotel bookings, airport transfers, and customized travel packages.
	Documentation: Prepare accurate itineraries, invoices, and necessary travel documentation for clients.
	Consultation: Provide basic visa advisory support, including documentation checklists and application guidance.
	Customer Support: Respond promptly to inquiries via phone, email, WhatsApp, and walk-ins.
	Liaison: Coordinate with airlines, consolidators, and hotels to resolve booking issues and ensure service delivery.
	Reporting: Maintain precise booking records, customer data, and transaction logs.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	OND / HND / B.Sc in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of experience in travel, reservations and ticketing.
	Working knowledge of visa processes and international travel requirements.
	Proficiency in CRM tools (e.g. HubSpot,Zoho or Salesforce)
	Demonstrated ability to work proactively,manage multiple tasks, and meet deadlines.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent communication and customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to :&nbsp;people@bedrockresidencies.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.",

Reservation & Ticketing Officer Job at Bedrock Residences




        
    

        
        Bedrock Residences is a hospitality firm offering premium, fully serviced apartments thoughtfully designed to deliver comfort, convenience, and an exceptional guest experience. We provide a personalized and memorable stay, tailored to meet the needs of both business and leisure travelers.

With a growing portfolio across key hubs including Ikeja GRA, Opebi, and Yaba, Bedrock has established itself as a leader in Nigeria’s expanding hospitality sector.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Reservation & Ticketing Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Hospitality

Job Summary

	The Reservation & Ticketing Officer will manage end-to-end travel operations, ensuring seamless bookings and exceptional guest experiences.
	You will be responsible for accurate ticket issuance, hotel reservations, and travel packages while maintaining strict compliance with airline and company policies.


Key Responsibilities


	Ticketing & Booking: Handle flight reservations, ticket issuance, reissues, refunds, and cancellations via airline portals.
	Travel Coordination: Process hotel bookings, airport transfers, and customized travel packages.
	Documentation: Prepare accurate itineraries, invoices, and necessary travel documentation for clients.
	Consultation: Provide basic visa advisory support, including documentation checklists and application guidance.
	Customer Support: Respond promptly to inquiries via phone, email, WhatsApp, and walk-ins.
	Liaison: Coordinate with airlines, consolidators, and hotels to resolve booking issues and ensure service delivery.
	Reporting: Maintain precise booking records, customer data, and transaction logs.


Requirements & Qualifications


	OND / HND / B.Sc in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
	2 - 3 years of experience in travel, reservations and ticketing.
	Working knowledge of visa processes and international travel requirements.
	Proficiency in CRM tools (e.g. HubSpot,Zoho or Salesforce)
	Demonstrated ability to work proactively,manage multiple tasks, and meet deadlines.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy
	Excellent communication and customer service skills.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 monthly.
